steps.title: Read the dimensions from the figure
steps.content: The figure labels three edges of the rectangular prism: length l = 6 cm (bottom), width w = 2 cm (right side), and height h = 3 cm (left side).

steps.title: Apply the volume formula
steps.content:
Substitute the dimensions into $V = lwh$:
$$V = 6 \times 2 \times 3$$
$$V = 12 \times 3 = 36$$
That matches choice A — A is correct.
